evals.prompt: Generate a bar chart showing how many links were created each month over the past year. Save it as links_per_month.png.
evals.expected_output: A PNG file named links_per_month.png in the current directory showing a bar chart with 12 monthly bars. The x-axis should show month labels (e.g. Apr 2025 … Mar 2026) and the y-axis should show integer link counts.

evals.prompt: I want to see the link creation stats for this project plotted as a chart. Export it to reports/link_stats.png.
evals.expected_output: A PNG at reports/link_stats.png containing a 12-month bar chart. The reports/ directory should be created automatically if it doesn't exist.

evals.prompt: Show me how active the link shortener has been month by month for the past year.
evals.expected_output: A bar chart PNG (default output path) covering the 12-month window. Each bar is labelled with its count and zero-count months should still appear as empty bars rather than being omitted.
